task_completion.description: Load the survey dataset denver_site_unclassified.csv into the TopoCal application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal application is open with a point cloud visible in the viewport, and the file name 'denver_site_unclassified.csv' is visible in the interface (e.g., window title, layer manager, or import dialog).

task_completion.description: Remove building roof points identified as anomalous flat clusters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent selects, filters, or deletes high-elevation point clusters (roofs, Z > 1608.0). The viewport should show the point cloud updating to exclude these top clusters, leaving approximately 800 ground points.

task_completion.description: Generate a Triangulated Irregular Network (TIN / MDT) from the resulting ground points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A triangulated mesh surface (TIN/MDT) is generated and visible in the TopoCal 3D viewport, connecting the remaining ground points.

task_completion.description: Export the cleaned ground points to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bare_earth_points.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in TopoCal or a File Explorer window showing 'bare_earth_points.csv' being saved to or existing in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ directory.
A save dialog in TopoCal or a File Explorer window showing 'bare_earth_model.top' being saved to or existing in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the TopoCal graphical user interface to process the data rather than bypassing it with scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through TopoCal menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes to filter points and generate the TIN.

integrity.description: The agent exported the results using the application's native export features, not by creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The files 'bare_earth_points.csv' and 'bare_earth_model.top' are created via TopoCal's 'Save' or 'Export' dialogs, rather than being created empty via terminal commands or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a genuine 3D point cloud and mesh.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TopoCal viewport displays actual 3D points and a triangulated mesh that changes in response to the agent's filtering actions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output CSV must be saved exactly to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bare_earth_points.csv'. The building roof points to be removed correspond to points with an elevation (Z) greater than 1608.0. The final cleaned dataset should contain approximately 800 ground points.
